summary: Custom Store Slug Setting feature testing completed. All backend API endpoints (GET /api/ecommerce/check-slug/{slug}, PUT /api/ecommerce/store-slug) are working correctly with proper slug validation. Frontend UI features including Online Store product catalogue, Store Dashboard dialog with tabs (Dashboard, Orders, B2B Customers, Inventory Sync, SEO Blog), E-Commerce Settings with Custom Store Subdomain section, and DNS Setup instructions dialog are all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Custom Store Slug feature well-implemented in server.py (lines 27835-27917)
Frontend EcommercePage.js correctly implements slug validation with debounced availability check
data-testid attributes present for key UI elements (custom-slug-input, save-slug-btn, ecommerce-settings-btn)
DNS instructions dialog provides clear CNAME record setup guidance
Slug validation enforces 3-30 chars, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens
Reserved words (admin, api, www, shop, etc.) properly blocked
seed_data_creation: Test slugs created via PUT /api/ecommerce/store-slug endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom store slug feature fully functional. Store URL displayed as test-store-ac1af3.bijnisbooks.com. Slug availability checking, validation, and DNS instructions all working correctly.

Online Store link shows Product Catalogu.details: Online Store sidebar link navigates to ItemsPage showing 3 products (Coke, Pizza, Burger) in grid layout with AI badges, search, and action buttons

Store Dashboard button visible in catalo.details: Store Dashboard button with chart icon visible in top header area with purple gradient background

Store Dashboard dialog opens showing E-c.details: Dialog shows E-Commerce header, store URL, tabs (Dashboard, Orders, B2B Customers, Inventory Sync, SEO Blog), and stats cards (Monthly Revenue, Monthly Orders, Avg Order Value, Pending Orders)

E-Commerce Settings dialog shows Custom.details: Settings dialog shows Enable Online Store toggle, Your Store URL section, Custom Store Subdomain section with globe icon header, slug input field, .bijnisbooks.com suffix, validation message, Save Slug and DNS Setup buttons

Custom slug input field accepts lowercas.details: Input field with data-testid='custom-slug-input' accepts valid slug format. Validation text shows 'Slug must be 3-30 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.'

Save Slug button enabled only when slug.details: Save Slug button shown in purple color, green checkmark appears with 'This slug is available!' message when slug is valid and available. Button disabled when slug is invalid or taken

DNS Setup button opens DNS instructions.details: DNS Setup button opens 'Connect Your Subdomain' dialog with Your Store is Ready message, CNAME record details (Type: CNAME, Host: shop, Value: stores.bijnisbooks.com, TTL: 3600), example explanation, 5-step setup instructions, and Copy DNS Record button

Backend API /api/ecommerce/check-slug re.details: GET endpoint returns {available: true/false, slug, preview_url} for valid slugs, rejects reserved words, too short slugs (<3 chars), and invalid formats

Backend API /api/ecommerce/store-slug up.details: PUT endpoint validates slug format, checks for reserved words, verifies uniqueness across tenants, updates MongoDB tenants collection, returns {slug, store_url, dns_instructions}
